what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-source channel, pointing to the asset image://design-source/landing-mockups/p-1.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no prose body.
It declares an attachment id att-dfa07f98, channel design-source, and attachment_type images.
The target field uses an image:// URI referencing landing-mockups/p-1.
No code symbols or narrative description are included.
standouts: The target URI image://design-source/landing-mockups/p-1 is the only substantive payload.
The file is a minimal, timestamped ledger record rather than a document.
It belongs to the design-source channel, suggesting a design artifact attachment.
conventions: Follows a YAML-frontmatter schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Uses a file name pattern att-<uuid>.md for attachment records.
References an external asset by a custom URI scheme rather than embedding it.
concerns: The target URI lacks a file extension, checksum, or size, so the exact asset format and integrity are not stated.
There is no caption, title, or author field to explain what the image depicts.
No parent entry id is given, so the attachment's exact association within the channel is implicit.
notes: A bare attachment ledger stub that links the design-source channel to a landing-mockup image asset.
questions: What image format and dimensions does the target asset have?
Which parent design-source entry is this attachment associated with?
Who added the attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — the file has no explicit stated purpose beyond its metadata fields, which match its role as an attachment record.
intention_signals: To create a stable, timestamped ledger entry that links a design-source channel artifact to a specific image asset for later retrieval or context.
novelty: Use of an image:// URI scheme to address the target asset.
contribution: The image attachment reference and its channel/timestamp metadata, providing a stable pointer from design-source to landing-mockups/p-1.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record named att-dfa07f98 in the design-source channel that references the image asset image://design-source/landing-mockups/p-1 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record and expose a discoverable link between a design-source channel entry and a landing-mockup image asset.
